privacy.title: Datenschutzerklärung
privacy.sub: How Ascendra Platforms collects, uses, and protects information on this website and through demo requests.

sections.html: Last updated: July 3, 2026

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.html:
Ascendra Platforms ("we", "us", "our") operates this B2B marketing website to provide information about our turnkey and white-label iGaming platform. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle personal data when you visit our site or submit a demo or contact request.

This policy applies to ascendraplatforms.com and related marketing properties. It does not govern player-facing operator websites powered by our platform — those are controlled by each operator's own privacy policies.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
sections.html:
We may collect the following when you interact with our website:

  • Contact and business details — company name, contact name, work email, country or region, and message content when you submit a demo or inquiry form.
  • Solution preferences — solution type (Turnkey, White Label, Integration), and expected launch timeline if provided.
  • Technical data — IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited, and referral source collected through standard analytics and server logs.
  • Communications — records of email or meeting correspondence following your inquiry.

sections.heading: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.html:
We use collected information to:

  • Respond to demo requests, sales inquiries, and support questions.
  • Provide product information relevant to your business needs.
  • Improve our website, content, and user experience.
  • Comply with legal obligations and protect against fraud or misuse.
  • Send follow-up communications related to your inquiry, where permitted.

We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

sections.heading: 4. Legal Basis (GDPR)
sections.html:
Where applicable under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), we process personal data based on:

  • Consent — when you submit a form and agree to this policy.
  • Legitimate interests — to respond to B2B inquiries and operate our marketing website.
  • Contractual necessity — when processing is required to evaluate or deliver services you request.

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.html: We may share information with trusted service providers who assist with hosting, analytics, email delivery, or CRM — solely to operate our business and under appropriate confidentiality obligations. We may also disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights and safety.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.html: We retain inquiry and contact records for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, manage ongoing business relationships, and meet legal retention requirements… You may request deletion where applicable law allows.

sections.heading: 7. Your Rights
sections.html: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, restrict, or object to processing of your personal data, and to data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@ascendraplatforms.com.

sections.heading: 8. Cookies and Analytics
sections.html: We may use cookies and similar technologies to analyze site traffic and improve performance. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Essential cookies required for site functionality may not be disabled.

sections.heading: 9. International Transfers
sections.html: Your information may be processed in countries other than your own. Where required, we implement appropriate safeguards for cross-border data transfers.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.html: For privacy-related questions or requests, contact: privacy@ascendraplatforms.com

terms.title: Nutzungsbedingungen
terms.sub: Terms governing use of the Ascendra Platforms marketing website and demo request services.

sections.html: Last updated: July 3, 2026

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.html: By accessing or using the Ascendra Platforms marketing website ("Site"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

sections.heading: 2. About Our Services
sections.html:
Ascendra Platforms provides B2B turnkey and white-label iGaming software for casino and sportsbook operators. Content on this Site is for informational and commercial inquiry purposes only. Nothing on the Site constitutes a binding offer, license, or service agreement.

Formal platform agreements, SLAs, and commercial terms are executed separately in writing between Ascendra Platforms and licensed operators.

sections.heading: 3. Permitted Use
sections.html:
You may use the Site to learn about our platform, request demos, and contact our sales team. You agree not to:

  • Use the Site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of applicable regulations.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, data, or networks.
  • Scrape, copy, or redistribute Site content without written permission.
  • Misrepresent your identity, affiliation, or licensing status when submitting inquiries.
  • Introduce malware or interfere with Site availability or security.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.html:
All content on this Site — including text, graphics, logos, product descriptions, and design — is owned text, graphics, logos, product descriptions, and design — is owned by Ascendra Platforms or its licensors and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent.

Third-party game vendor names and logos displayed for illustration are trademarks of their respective owners.

sections.heading: 5. Demo and Sales Inquiries
sections.html: Demo requests and contact submissions do not guarantee product availability, pricing, or contractual engagement. We reserve the right to decline inquiries that do not meet our commercial, regulatory, or compliance criteria.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.html: The Site and its content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. Product capabilities described on the Site may vary by deployment and jurisdiction.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.html: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Ascendra Platforms shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Site. Our total liability for claims related to the Site shall not exceed one hundred USD (USD 100).

sections.heading: 8. Regulatory Notice
sections.html: iGaming operations are subject to licensing and regulation in each jurisdiction. Operators using Ascendra Platforms are solely responsible for obtaining and maintaining valid licenses and complying with local laws. We do not provide legal advice regarding market entry or licensing.

sections.heading: 9. Links to Third Parties
sections.html: The Site may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, privacy practices, or policies of external sites.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to Terms
sections.html: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates the most recent revision.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
sections.html: These Terms are governed by the laws specified in your master service agreement, or otherwise as agreed in writing. For website-only disputes absent a separate agreement, disputes shall be resolved in accordance with applicable law at our principal place of business.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.html: Questions about these Terms: legal@ascendraplatforms.com

aml.title: AML-Richtlinie
aml.sub: Anti-money laundering principles and compliance approach for Ascendra Platforms B2B services.

sections.html: Last updated: July 3, 2026

sections.heading: 1. Policy Statement
sections.html: Ascendra Platforms is committed to preventing money laundering, terrorist financing, and other financial crimes. We design our platform with tools that help licensed operators meet their AML obligations, and we apply due diligence in our own B2B commercial relationships.

sections.heading: 2. Platform AML Capabilities
sections.html:
Operators deploying Ascendra Platforms have access to built-in compliance features, including:

  • Know Your Customer (KYC) document collection and verification workflows.
  • Anti-Fraud System with AML blocklist screening on signup and transactions.
  • Pre-withdrawal risk gates and automated hold for high-risk payouts.
  • Audit trails for risk decisions, player verification status, and admin actions.
  • Configurable deposit, withdrawal, and betting limits.
  • Player transaction history and reporting for suspicious activity review.

sections.heading: 3. Operator Responsibilities
sections.html:
Licensed operators remain ultimately responsible for AML compliance in their jurisdictions. Operators must:

  • Maintain valid gaming and financial services licenses where required.
  • Implement and enforce KYC and enhanced due diligence policies appropriate to their market.
  • File suspicious activity reports (SARs) or equivalent disclosures with relevant authorities.
  • Train staff on AML procedures and platform tooling.
  • Keep branded AML policy pages current for their player-facing websites.

sections.heading: 4. B2B Due Diligence
sections.html: Before entering commercial agreements, Ascendra Platforms may conduct due diligence on prospective operator partners, including identity verification, licensing status, beneficial ownership, and jurisdiction risk assessment. We reserve the right to decline or terminate relationships that present unacceptable AML or regulatory risk.

sections.heading: 5. Sanctions and Blocklists
sections.html: Our Anti-Fraud System supports screening against applicable sanctions and blocklists. Operators configure enforcement policies aligned with their regulatory requirements… Screening outcomes may result in account blocks, transaction holds, or enhanced verification requirements…

sections.heading: 6. Record Keeping
sections.html: The platform maintains transaction and audit records to support operator compliance programs. Retention periods should be configured by operators in accordance with applicable law.

sections.heading: 7. Reporting Concerns
sections.html: To report AML-related concerns regarding Ascendra Platforms B2B operations, contact: compliance@ascendraplatforms.com

responsible.title: Verantwortungsvolles Spielen
responsible.sub: Our commitment to responsible gaming tools and operator compliance support.

sections.html: Last updated: July 3, 2026

sections.heading: 1. Our Commitment
sections.html:
Ascendra Platforms believes iGaming operators have a duty to protect players. Our platform includes responsible gaming (RG) tools that operators can configure and enforce across casino and sportsbook products.

This page describes platform capabilities. Player-facing responsible gaming policies are published by each licensed operator on their own branded websites.

sections.heading: 2. Platform Tools for Operators
sections.html:
Ascendra Platforms provides operators with the following player protection features:

  • Deposit limits — daily, weekly, and monthly caps set by players or enforced by operators.
  • Loss and wagering limits — controls on maximum losses or bet amounts over defined periods.
  • Session limits — reminders and automatic logouts after configured play duration.
  • Cooling-off periods — temporary account restrictions chosen by the player.
  • Self-exclusion — extended account closure for players who need a break from gambling.
  • Reality checks — periodic notifications showing time spent and net position.
  • Underage prevention — age verification integrated with KYC workflows.
  • Sportsbook limits — market-level and player-level betting caps.

sections.heading: 3. Operator Admin Controls
sections.html: Operators manage responsible gaming settings through the Ascendra Platforms backoffice — applying limits per player, segment, or jurisdiction, and reviewing accounts flagged for problematic behavior through integrated risk and fraud monitoring. limits per player, segment, or jurisdiction, and reviewing accounts flagged for problematic behavior through integrated risk and fraud monitoring.

sections.heading: 4. Player Support
sections.html: Operators can deliver in-platform support via live chat and ticketing, directing players to professional help organizations where appropriate. Ascendra Platforms enables operators to display responsible gaming information and helpline links on player-facing sites.

sections.heading: 5. Training and Best Practices
sections.html: We recommend operators train support and compliance teams on responsible gaming procedures, monitor player behavior indicators, and align RG policies with requirements…in each licensed market.

sections.heading: 6. Get Help
sections.html: If you are a player seeking support, please contact the operator of the website where you play. If you are an operator evaluating Ascendra Platforms responsible gaming capabilities, request a demo or email compliance@ascendraplatforms.com.
